story.iWant: delete a lesson I no longer need
story.soThat: I can keep the course clean and organized

subtasks.subtask: 1.1 Create `src/containers/Main/LessonDelete/` directory
1.2 Create `connect.ts` with delete mutation and dialog state logic
1.3 Create `types.ts` with LessonDeleteProps interface
1.4 Create `index.tsx` with AlertDialog confirmation UI
2.1 Use `AlertDialog` components from shadcn/ui
2.2 Display lesson title dynamically in the confirmation message
2.3 Add warning text about permanent deletion of scripts/audio
2.4 Style "Cancel" button as outline variant
2.5 Style "Delete" button as destructive variant (red)
3.1 Implement `$api.useMutation('delete', '/api/courses/{slug}/lessons/{id}')`
3.2 Handle `onSuccess`: invalidate lessons query, show success toast, close dialog
3.3 Handle `onError`: show error toast with message, close dialog
3.4 Pass `courseSlug` and `lesson.id` to mutation params
4.1 Wire Cancel button to close dialog via `onOpenChange`
4.2 Ensure Escape key closes dialog (built-in AlertDialog behavior)
4.3 Prevent dialog close while delete is pending (optional: disable buttons)
5.1 Add delete modal state (`isLessonDeleteOpen`) to CourseDetail connect.ts
5.2 Add `lessonToDelete` state to track selected lesson for deletion
5.3 Create `handleDeleteLesson` callback to open dialog with lesson data
5.4 Create `handleCloseLessonDelete` callback to close dialog and reset state
5.5 Pass `onDelete` handler to LessonList component
5.6 Render LessonDelete dialog in CourseDetail index.tsx

task.title: Add fade-out animation for deleted lesson

subtasks.subtask: 6.1 Consider using React Query optimistic update for instant visual feedback
6.2 Or implement CSS transition on lesson removal
7.1 Run `bun typecheck` - verify no type errors
7.2 Run `bun lint:fix` - verify no lint errors
7.3 Manual test: dialog opens with correct lesson title
7.4 Manual test: clicking Cancel closes dialog without changes
7.5 Manual test: pressing Escape closes dialog without changes
7.6 Manual test: clicking Delete removes lesson and shows toast
7.7 Manual test: lesson list updates after successful deletion

criterion.when: I click the delete icon (🗑️) on a lesson row
criterion.then: a confirmation dialog appears with: Title: "Delete Lesson", Message: "Are you sure you want to delete '[lesson title]'?", Warning: "This will permanently delete any generated scripts and audio.", Buttons: "Cancel" (outline) and "Delete" (destructive red)

criterion.given: the delete confirmation dialog is open
criterion.then: The lesson is deleted from the backend, A success toast shows: "Lesson deleted", The lesson disappears from the list with fade animation, The dialog closes automatically

criterion.given: the delete confirmation dialog is open
criterion.then: The dialog closes, No changes are made to the lesson or course
An error toast shows: "Failed to delete lesson", The lesson remains in the list unchanged, The dialog closes

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Strict separation between business logic (connect.ts) and presentation (index.tsx). connect.ts handles all API calls, forms, side effects. index.tsx is pure presentational.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: All API interactions use auto-generated type-safe hooks from openapi-react-query. Use $api.useMutation for mutations with onSuccess/onError callbacks.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Toast Notifications (Sonner): Success: Green toast, 4s auto-dismiss. Error: Red toast, 6s auto-dismiss. Use toast.success() and toast.error() from sonner.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Pattern: Modal dialog. Content: "Are you sure you want to delete [item name]?". Warning: "This action cannot be undone". Buttons: "Cancel" (secondary) + "Delete" (destructive primary).

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Style: Red/pink (#f7768e) background, white text. Usage: "Delete Course", "Remove Lesson", "Discard Changes". Hover: Darker red. Always require confirmation.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: AlertDialog traps focus when open. Escape key closes dialog (built-in). Delete button has aria-label for accessibility. Destructive button styled with high contrast red.

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: Use AlertDialog from shadcn/ui. Mutation: $api.useMutation('delete', '/api/lessons/{id}'). Invalidate course query on success. Add exit animation with Tailwind/Framer Motion.

doc.title: Story 3.3 Edit Existing Lesson
doc.snippet: LessonEdit Container created at src/containers/Main/LessonEdit/. Uses AlertDialog for unsaved changes confirmation. CourseDetail state management pattern: selectedLesson state, handleCloseLessonEdit(open: boolean) handler.

file.reason: Reference pattern for mutation setup, query invalidation, dialog state management, and onSuccess/onError handling. Follow this pattern for LessonDelete.
Reference for AlertDialog usage pattern, handleOpenChange pattern, button styling, and dialog composition.
Reference for LessonDeleteProps interface structure: courseSlug, lesson, open, onOpenChange, onSuccess.

Parent container that will integrate LessonDelete. Already has LessonEdit modal state pattern (isLessonEditOpen, selectedLesson, handleEditLesson, handleCloseLessonEdit). ADD similar pattern for delete modal.
Parent view that renders LessonEdit modal. Add LessonDelete modal rendering after LessonEdit. Pass onDelete handler to LessonList.
Already has onDeleteLesson prop wired up. Passes onDelete to LessonListItem. Integration point for delete functionality.
Delete button already implemented with onDelete callback. Button is styled destructive, has aria-label. No changes needed to this component.

file.symbol: AlertDialog, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogTitle, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogCancel, AlertDialogAction
file.reason: shadcn/ui AlertDialog components to use for delete confirmation. Already styled and accessible.
OpenAPI client for API mutations. Use $api.useMutation('delete', '/api/courses/{slug}/lessons/{id}').
Type definition for Lesson entity. Use for typing lessonToDelete state and LessonDeleteProps.

ecosystem.name: node
ecosystem.package: Toast notifications - use toast.success() and toast.error()
Query client for cache invalidation via queryClient.invalidateQueries()
Icons - Trash2 icon already used in LessonListItem

interface.name: DELETE /api/courses/{slug}/lessons/{id}
interface.notes: Path parameters: slug (string), id (number). Returns 204 on success, 422 on validation error.

interface.name: $api.useMutation
interface.notes: Auto-generated type-safe mutation hook. Options include onSuccess, onError callbacks.

interface.name: LessonDeleteProps
interface.signature: { courseSlug: string; lesson: Lesson; open: boolean; onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void; onSuccess?: () => void; }
interface.notes: Same pattern as LessonEditProps. Props for LessonDelete container component.

interface.name: LessonList.onDeleteLesson
interface.notes: Already implemented. Wire this to CourseDetail's handleDeleteLesson callback.

constraints.constraint: Container Pattern: All mutation logic in connect.ts, pure UI in index.tsx
OpenAPI-First: Use $api.useMutation, never manual fetch calls
Type Safety: Import Lesson type from @/types/models, not from @/types/api directly
Cache Invalidation: Invalidate ['get', '/api/courses/{slug}/lessons'] on successful delete
Error Handling: Always show toast on success/error, close dialog after operation
AlertDialog traps focus, Escape key dismisses, aria-labels on buttons
Use AlertDialog (not Dialog) for confirmations - requires explicit action, no outside-click dismiss
Delete button uses variant="destructive" or class="bg-destructive hover:bg-destructive/90"
Run bun typecheck and bun lint:fix before marking complete

tests.standards: Per project patterns: Typecheck validation (bun typecheck), lint validation (bun lint:fix), manual testing of UI interactions. No automated E2E tests required for MVP.

locations.location: Manual testing via dev server (bun dev)

ideas.idea: Verify dialog displays correct lesson title from props
Verify dialog has warning text about permanent deletion
Verify Cancel button styled as outline, Delete as destructive
Verify successful delete shows "Lesson deleted" toast
Verify lesson disappears from list after deletion
Verify dialog closes automatically after successful delete
Verify Cancel button closes dialog without API call
Verify Escape key closes dialog without API call
Verify failed delete shows "Failed to delete lesson" toast
Verify lesson remains in list after failed delete

implementationNotes.note: Follow the EXACT same pattern as LessonEdit container. The structure is: - types.ts: Define LessonDeleteProps (same shape as LessonEditProps) - connect.ts: Setup delete mutation with onSuccess/onError, return handlers - index.tsx: AlertDialog UI with lesson title, warning text, buttons

CourseDetail integration pattern from Story 3.3: 1. Add state: isLessonDeleteOpen, lessonToDelete 2. Add handlers: handleDeleteLesson (opens dialog), handleCloseLessonDelete (closes and resets) 3. Pass onDeleteLesson to LessonList component 4. Render LessonDelete dialog with lessonToDelete

AlertDialog vs Dialog: Use AlertDialog for delete confirmation because it: - Requires explicit button click (no outside-click dismiss) - Has built-in Cancel/Action button components with correct styling - Is semantically correct for destructive confirmations
Optional fade-out animation: Can be achieved with React Query optimistic update or CSS transitions. Not required for MVP, can be added as enhancement.
